Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose logs server --tail 30 2>&1")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT id, display_name, slot_index, gold FROM players WHERE game_id = \(SELECT id FROM games ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1\);""")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT g.id, g.status, g.current_turn, g.created_at, COUNT\(p.id\) as player_count FROM games g LEFT JOIN players p ON p.game_id = g.id GROUP BY g.id ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;""")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT p.display_name, p.slot_index, p.gold, s.name as settlement, s.hex_q, s.hex_r FROM players p LEFT JOIN settlements s ON s.owner_id = p.id WHERE p.game_id = ''875f870f-63b5-4ccc-81dc-ca295ade1076'';""")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT p.display_name, COUNT\(v.id\) as visible_hexes FROM players p LEFT JOIN hex_visibility v ON v.player_id = p.id AND v.game_id = p.game_id WHERE p.game_id = ''875f870f-63b5-4ccc-81dc-ca295ade1076'' GROUP BY p.display_name;""")
Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec server ls /app/apps/client/dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || echo ''dir not found''")
Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec server sh -c ""grep -c ''.arc\('' /app/apps/client/dist/assets/index--Q1-ieJV.js""")
Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec server sh -c ""grep -c ''pixiReady'' /app/apps/client/dist/assets/index--Q1-ieJV.js""")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT p.display_name, o.orders->''movements'' as movements FROM turn_orders o JOIN players p ON p.id = o.player_id WHERE o.game_id = ''b91354ea-680b-4d36-947a-f2931b181bc9'' ORDER BY o.turn_number DESC LIMIT 4;""")

Bash(ssh rory@192.168.0.196 "cd ~/kingdoms-game && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres kingdoms -c ""SELECT a.name, a.hex_q, a.hex_r, p.display_name FROM armies a JOIN players p ON p.id = a.owner_id WHERE a.game_id = ''b91354ea-680b-4d36-947a-f2931b181bc9'';""")
